TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}
TEXT.source: told by Giɫgiɫaw of Vaɫulu village

S.FORM: tiaken ti Giɫgiɫaw aken.
S.PHON: tiakən ti giʎgiʎaw akən.
S.FORM: tiaken ti Giljgiljaw aken.
S.PHON: tiakən ti giʎgiʎaw akən.
S.TRANSL: I am Giɫgiɫaw.

S.FORM: se Vaɫulu aken.
S.PHON: sə vaʎuɭu akən.
S.FORM: se Valjulu aken.
S.PHON: sə vaʎuɭu akən.
S.TRANSL: of Vaɫulu village.

S.FORM: sinipuaɫak aken i Vaɫulu.
S.PHON: sinipuaʎak akən i vaʎuɭu.
S.FORM: sinipualjak aken i Valjulu.
S.PHON: sinipuaʎak akən i vaʎuɭu.
S.TRANSL: I was born in Vaɫulu.

S.FORM: ḍusanga ken a puluq katu sepatj a tsaviɫ tu pinuaɫakan tjanuaken.
S.PHON: ɖusaŋa kən a puɭuq katu səpac a ʦaviʎ tu pinuaʎakan canuakən.
S.FORM: drusanga ken a puluq katu sepatj a cavilj tu pinualjakan tjanuaken.
S.PHON: ɖusaŋa kən a puɭuq katu səpaʦ a ʦaviʎ tu pinuaʎakan ʦanuakən.
S.TRANSL: It is 24 years since I was born.

S.FORM: ka tapuluq aken katu sepatj a tsaviɫ sema gaku aken a ventsik.
S.PHON: ka tapuɭuq akən katu səpac a ʦaviʎ səma gaku akən a vənʦik.
S.FORM: ka tapuluq aken katu sepatj a cavilj sema gaku aken a vencik.
S.PHON: ka tapuɭuq akən katu səpaʦ a ʦaviʎ səma gaku akən a vənʦik.
S.TRANSL: When I was 14 I went to school to study.

S.FORM: sepatj aken a tsaviɫ i gaku.
S.PHON: səpac akən a ʦaviʎ i gaku.
S.FORM: sepatj aken a cavilj i gaku.
S.PHON: səpaʦ akən a ʦaviʎ i gaku.
S.TRANSL: I was 4 years in school.

S.FORM: ka ini anan ka ken a sema gaku napusalasaladj aken tjai kama tjai kina tua sengsengan.
S.PHON: ka ini anan ka kən a səma gaku napusaɭasaɭaɉ akən cai kama cai kina tua səŋsəŋan.
S.FORM: ka ini anan ka ken a sema gaku napusalasaladj aken tjai kama tjai kina tua sengsengan.
S.PHON: ka ini anan ka kən a səma gaku napusaɭasaɭaɉ akən ʦai kama ʦai kina tua səŋsəŋan.
S.TRANSL: Before I went to school I helped my father and mother in their (field) work.

S.FORM: ka i gaku anan aken matsay ti kama.
S.PHON: ka i gaku anan akən maʦaj ti kama.
S.FORM: ka i gaku anan aken macay ti kama.
S.PHON: ka i gaku anan akən maʦaj ti kama.
S.TRANSL: When I was still at school my father died.

S.FORM: qau ti kaka itua kuaping.
S.PHON: qau ti kaka itua kuapiŋ.
S.FORM: qau ti kaka itua kuaping.
S.PHON: qau ti kaka itua kuapiŋ.
S.TRANSL: My elder brother was in the army.

S.FORM: qau ti kina izua aɫak a lumamad.
S.PHON: qau ti kina izua aʎak a ɭumamad.
S.FORM: qau ti kina izua aljak a lumamad.
S.PHON: qau ti kina izua aʎak a ɭumamad.
S.TRANSL: My mother had very young children.

S.FORM: izua ku kaka kakeḍian anan a maḍusa, ini anan ka makaya masengseng.
S.PHON: izua ku kaka kakəɖian anan a maɖusa, ini anan ka makaja masəŋsəŋ.
S.FORM: izua ku kaka kakedrian anan a madrusa, ini anan ka makaya masengseng.
S.PHON: izua ku kaka kakəɖian anan a maɖusa, ini anan ka makaja masəŋsəŋ.
S.TRANSL: My two siblings were still children, not yet able to work.

S.FORM: nasemalimsim tuazua tia kina.
S.PHON: nasəmaɭimsim tuazua tia kina.
S.FORM: nasemalimsim tuazua tia kina.
S.PHON: nasəmaɭimsim tuazua tia kina.
S.TRANSL: My mother and the children were very badly off.

S.FORM: mana ku sinikitjaula i gaku.
S.PHON: mana ku sinikicauɭa i gaku.
S.FORM: mana ku sinikitjaula i gaku.
S.PHON: mana ku sinikiʦauɭa i gaku.
S.TRANSL: That is why I left school.

S.FORM: salimsim aken tjaia kina tua mareka ku kaka.
S.PHON: saɭimsim akən caia kina tua marəka ku kaka.
S.FORM: salimsim aken tjaia kina tua mareka ku kaka.
S.PHON: saɭimsim akən ʦaia kina tua marəka ku kaka.
S.TRANSL: I had pity on my mother and my siblings.

S.FORM: neka nu muri paquzip.
S.PHON: nəka nu muri paquzip.
S.FORM: neka nu muri paquzip.
S.PHON: nəka nu muri paquzip.
S.TRANSL: There was noone to provide for them.

S.FORM: qau tuazua naselapay aken tua nia sengsengan.
S.PHON: qau tuazua nasəɭapaj akən tua nia səŋsəŋan.
S.FORM: qau tuazua naselapay aken tua nia sengsengan.
S.PHON: qau tuazua nasəɭapaj akən tua nia səŋsəŋan.
S.TRANSL: I had a bad time then working for us.

S.FORM: matsidiɫ aken tua ku kemudanga.
S.PHON: maʦidiʎ akən tua ku kəmudaŋa.
S.FORM: macidilj aken tua ku kemudanga.
S.PHON: maʦidiʎ akən tua ku kəmudaŋa.
S.TRANSL: I had to do everything on my own.

S.FORM: maluɫay aken aravats.
S.PHON: maɭuʎaj akən aravaʦ.
S.FORM: maluljay aken aravac.
S.PHON: maɭuʎaj akən aravaʦ.
S.TRANSL: I was very tired.

S.FORM: ɫakua nu ika ken a masengseng, neka nu kanen nia kina nua mareka ku kaka.
S.PHON: ʎakua nu ika kən a masəŋsəŋ, nəka nu kanən nia kina nua marəka ku kaka.
S.FORM: ljakua nu ika ken a masengseng, neka nu kanen nia kina nua mareka ku kaka.
S.PHON: ʎakua nu ika kən a masəŋsəŋ, nəka nu kanən nia kina nua marəka ku kaka.
S.TRANSL: But if I didn’t work there would be no food for my mother and my siblings.

S.FORM: qau kipaqadiɫ aken a masengseng ta ku sipaquzip tjaia kina tua mareka ku kaka, patje mangtjez ti kaka a nakisan kuaping.
S.PHON: qau kipaqadiʎ akən a masəŋsəŋ ta ku sipaquzip caia kina tua marəka ku kaka, pacə maŋcəz ti kaka a nakisan kuapiŋ.
S.FORM: qau kipaqadilj aken a masengseng ta ku sipaquzip tjaia kina tua mareka ku kaka, patje mangtjez ti kaka a nakisan kuaping.
S.PHON: qau kipaqadiʎ akən a masəŋsəŋ ta ku sipaquzip ʦaia kina tua marəka ku kaka, paʦə maŋʦəz ti kaka a nakisan kuapiŋ.
S.TRANSL: So I put up with working to provide for my mother and my siblings, until my elder brother came back from the army.

S.FORM: ka mangtjez anga ti kaka a nakisan kuaping, izuanga pusaladj tjanuaken tua nia sengsengan.
S.PHON: ka maŋcəz aŋa ti kaka a nakisan kuapiŋ, izuaŋa pusaɭaɉ canuakən tua nia səŋsəŋan.
S.FORM: ka mangtjez anga ti kaka a nakisan kuaping, izuanga pusaladj tjanuaken tua nia sengsengan.
S.PHON: ka maŋʦəz aŋa ti kaka a nakisan kuapiŋ, izuaŋa pusaɭaɉ ʦanuakən tua nia səŋsəŋan.
S.TRANSL: When my brother had come back from the army there was someone to help me with our work.

S.FORM: lima ken a tsaviɫ a masengseng a matsidiɫ, sa pangtjengtjez ti kaka, saka izuanga ku saladj a masengseng.
S.PHON: ɭima kən a ʦaviʎ a masəŋsəŋ a maʦidiʎ, sa paŋcəŋcəz ti kaka, saka izuaŋa ku saɭaɉ a masəŋsəŋ.
S.FORM: lima ken a cavilj a masengseng a macidilj, sa pangtjengtjez ti kaka, saka izuanga ku saladj a masengseng.
S.PHON: ɭima kən a ʦaviʎ a masəŋsəŋ a maʦidiʎ, sa paŋʦəŋʦəz ti kaka, saka izuaŋa ku saɭaɉ a masəŋsəŋ.
S.TRANSL: I did the work on my own for 5 years; then my brother came, and I had a companion in the work.

S.FORM: ka mangtjez anga ti kaka, keḍi anga a ku sengsengan.
S.PHON: ka maŋcəz aŋa ti kaka, kəɖi aŋa a ku səŋsəŋan.
S.FORM: ka mangtjez anga ti kaka, kedri anga a ku sengsengan.
S.PHON: ka maŋʦəz aŋa ti kaka, kəɖi aŋa a ku səŋsəŋan.
S.TRANSL: When my brother came back, there was less work for me.

S.FORM: ika ken a maluɫay anga.
S.PHON: ika kən a maɭuʎaj aŋa.
S.FORM: ika ken a maluljay anga.
S.PHON: ika kən a maɭuʎaj aŋa.
S.TRANSL: I wasn’t tired out.

S.FORM: makayanga ken a kivala sema tjuqaɫa, izua i Paɫul, i Payuan, i Qutsapungan, sema Takaw.
S.PHON: makajaŋa kən a kivaɭa səma cuqaʎa, izua i paʎuɭ, i pajuan, i quʦapuŋan, səma takaw.
S.FORM: makayanga ken a kivala sema tjuqalja, izua i Paljul, i Payuan, i Qucapungan, sema Takaw.
S.PHON: makajaŋa kən a kivaɭa səma ʦuqaʎa, izua i paʎuɭ, i pajuan, i quʦapuŋan, səma takaw.
S.TRANSL: I could go off for fun to other places-to Paɫul, Payuan, Qutsapungan, and to Takao (Kaohsiung).

S.FORM: namasengsengseng aken i Takaw a kipaisu.
S.PHON: namasəŋsəŋsəŋ akən i takaw a kipaisu.
S.FORM: namasengsengseng aken i Takaw a kipaisu.
S.PHON: namasəŋsəŋsəŋ akən i takaw a kipaisu.
S.TRANSL: I worked in Takao to earn money.

S.FORM: ku siveli tua ku itung.
S.PHON: ku sivəɭi tua ku ituŋ.
S.FORM: ku siveli tua ku itung.
S.PHON: ku sivəɭi tua ku ituŋ.
S.TRANSL: With it I bought clothes.

S.FORM: ka izuanga ku itung, vaik anga ken a sema umaq; sa ku paitungi anga tia kina a mareka ku kaka.
S.PHON: ka izuaŋa ku ituŋ, vaik aŋa kən a səma umaq; sa ku paituŋi aŋa tia kina a marəka ku kaka.
S.FORM: ka izuanga ku itung, vaik anga ken a sema umaq; sa ku paitungi anga tia kina a mareka ku kaka.
S.PHON: ka izuaŋa ku ituŋ, vaik aŋa kən a səma umaq; sa ku paituŋi aŋa tia kina a marəka ku kaka.
S.TRANSL: When I had got some clothes I went back home; and I gave clothes to my mother and my siblings.

S.FORM: maleva ravats.
S.PHON: maɭəva ravaʦ.
S.FORM: maleva ravac.
S.PHON: maɭəva ravaʦ.
S.TRANSL: They were very pleased.

S.FORM: tu ku sinaTakavan navenli aken tua ku itung.
S.PHON: tu ku sinatakavan navənɭi akən tua ku ituŋ.
S.FORM: tu ku sinaTakavan navenli aken tua ku itung.
S.PHON: tu ku sinatakavan navənɭi akən tua ku ituŋ.
S.TRANSL: Every time I went to Takao I bought clothes.

S.FORM: maleva ravats ti kina.
S.PHON: maɭəva ravaʦ ti kina.
S.FORM: maleva ravac ti kina.
S.PHON: maɭəva ravaʦ ti kina.
S.TRANSL: My mother was very pleased.

S.FORM: ɫakua tiaken nakuya ken aravats.
S.PHON: ʎakua tiakən nakuja kən aravaʦ.
S.FORM: ljakua tiaken nakuya ken aravac.
S.PHON: ʎakua tiakən nakuja kən aravaʦ.
S.TRANSL: But I was very bad.

S.FORM: ku djinukul anga ti kina a ku kaka.
S.PHON: ku ɉinukuɭ aŋa ti kina a ku kaka.
S.FORM: ku djinukul anga ti kina a ku kaka.
S.PHON: ku ɉinukuɭ aŋa ti kina a ku kaka.
S.TRANSL: I hit my mother and my siblings.

S.FORM: nakuya ken aravats.
S.PHON: nakuja kən aravaʦ.
S.FORM: nakuya ken aravac.
S.PHON: nakuja kən aravaʦ.
S.TRANSL: I was very bad.

S.FORM: ɫakua tutsu tu ku kinasinzian inika ken a djemukudjukul anga.
S.PHON: ʎakua tuʦu tu ku kinasinzian inika kən a ɉəmukuɉukuɭ aŋa.
S.FORM: ljakua tucu tu ku kinasinzian inika ken a djemukudjukul anga.
S.PHON: ʎakua tuʦu tu ku kinasinzian inika kən a ɉəmukuɉukuɭ aŋa.
S.TRANSL: But now since becoming a believer I don’t hit people any more.

S.FORM: lemangdanga ken tua tulu nua Tsemas.
S.PHON: ɭəmaŋdaŋa kən tua tuɭu nua ʦəmas.
S.FORM: lemangdanga ken tua tulu nua Cemas.
S.PHON: ɭəmaŋdaŋa kən tua tuɭu nua ʦəmas.
S.TRANSL: Now I listen to the teaching of God.

S.FORM: kisamuɫanga ken a semupu tua siisiu.
S.PHON: kisamuʎaŋa kən a səmupu tua siisiu.
S.FORM: kisamuljanga ken a semupu tua siisiu.
S.PHON: kisamuʎaŋa kən a səmupu tua siisiu.
S.TRANSL: I read the Bible frequently.

S.FORM: qau kemɫang aken tua kiɫivak tua tja kina tua timaimanga.
S.PHON: qau kəmʎaŋ akən tua kiʎivak tua ca kina tua timaimaŋa.
S.FORM: qau kemljang aken tua kiljivak tua tja kina tua timaimanga.
S.PHON: qau kəmʎaŋ akən tua kiʎivak tua ʦa kina tua timaimaŋa.
S.TRANSL: I know about loving our mothers and everyone.

S.FORM: ka sangasangasan kisan sinzia zua ku kaka maḍusa, sanaka ti kina.
S.PHON: ka saŋasaŋasan kisan sinzia zua ku kaka maɖusa, sanaka ti kina.
S.FORM: ka sangasangasan kisan sinzia zua ku kaka madrusa, sanaka ti kina.
S.PHON: ka saŋasaŋasan kisan sinzia zua ku kaka maɖusa, sanaka ti kina.
S.TRANSL: At first my two siblings became believers, and then my mother.

S.FORM: "kaka," aya zua ku kaka, "kisan sinzia-u.
S.PHON: "kaka," aja zua ku kaka, "kisan sinzia-u.
S.FORM: "kaka," aya zua ku kaka, "kisan sinzia-u.
S.PHON: "kaka," aja zua ku kaka, "kisan sinzia-u.
S.TRANSL: My siblings said to me: “Brother, become a believer.

S.FORM: nanguaq aravats.
S.PHON: naŋuaq aravaʦ.
S.FORM: nanguaq aravac.
S.PHON: naŋuaq aravaʦ.
S.TRANSL: It’s very good.

S.FORM: inika tjen a marivurivu anga.
S.PHON: inika cən a marivurivu aŋa.
S.FORM: inika tjen a marivurivu anga.
S.PHON: inika ʦən a marivurivu aŋa.
S.TRANSL: We don’t quarrel any more.

S.FORM: ika tjen a tsemakatsakaw anga.
S.PHON: ika cən a ʦəmakaʦakaw aŋa.
S.FORM: ika tjen a cemakacakaw anga.
S.PHON: ika ʦən a ʦəmakaʦakaw aŋa.
S.TRANSL: We don’t steal.

S.FORM: nu matsay itjen vaik itjen a sema tjarivavaw, aya za tulu tjanuamen.
S.PHON: nu maʦaj icən vaik icən a səma carivavaw, aja za tuɭu canuamən.
S.FORM: nu macay itjen vaik itjen a sema tjarivavaw, aya za tulu tjanuamen.
S.PHON: nu maʦaj iʦən vaik iʦən a səma ʦarivavaw, aja za tuɭu ʦanuamən.
S.TRANSL: We are taught that when we die we go to heaven.

S.FORM: nekanga nu tja pasalisaliw nu kisan sinzia itjen.
S.PHON: nəkaŋa nu ca pasaɭisaɭiw nu kisan sinzia icən.
S.FORM: nekanga nu tja pasalisaliw nu kisan sinzia itjen.
S.PHON: nəkaŋa nu ʦa pasaɭisaɭiw nu kisan sinzia iʦən.
S.TRANSL: We have no more sins when we become believers.

S.FORM: qau kisan sinzia-u.
S.PHON: qau kisan sinzia-u.
S.FORM: qau kisan sinzia-u.
S.PHON: qau kisan sinzia-u.
S.TRANSL: Become a believer.

S.FORM: nanguaq aravats.
S.PHON: naŋuaq aravaʦ.
S.FORM: nanguaq aravac.
S.PHON: naŋuaq aravaʦ.
S.TRANSL: It’s very good.

S.FORM: uɫa masualap a su pasalisaliw."
S.PHON: uʎa masuaɭap a su pasaɭisaɭiw."
S.FORM: ulja masualap a su pasalisaliw."
S.PHON: uʎa masuaɭap a su pasaɭisaɭiw."
S.TRANSL: And your sins will be taken away.”

S.FORM: pasemalavan aken nua ku kaka tua tulu nua Tsemas.
S.PHON: pasəmaɭavan akən nua ku kaka tua tuɭu nua ʦəmas.
S.FORM: pasemalavan aken nua ku kaka tua tulu nua Cemas.
S.PHON: pasəmaɭavan akən nua ku kaka tua tuɭu nua ʦəmas.
S.TRANSL: My siblings told me the teaching of God.

S.FORM: inika ken a masalu.
S.PHON: inika kən a masaɭu.
S.FORM: inika ken a masalu.
S.PHON: inika kən a masaɭu.
S.TRANSL: I didn’t believe.

S.FORM: ɫakua ku patsunan a sikudan nua ku kaka.
S.PHON: ʎakua ku paʦunan a sikudan nua ku kaka.
S.FORM: ljakua ku pacunan a sikudan nua ku kaka.
S.PHON: ʎakua ku paʦunan a sikudan nua ku kaka.
S.TRANSL: But I noticed my siblings’ behaviour.

S.FORM: inika marivurivu anga.
S.PHON: inika marivurivu aŋa.
S.FORM: inika marivurivu anga.
S.PHON: inika marivurivu aŋa.
S.TRANSL: They didn’t quarrel any more.

S.FORM: nu mangtjez a kasi gaku, vaik a tsaɫum, vaik a kitsatsevung.
S.PHON: nu maŋcəz a kasi gaku, vaik a ʦaʎum, vaik a kiʦaʦəvuŋ.
S.FORM: nu mangtjez a kasi gaku, vaik a caljum, vaik a kicacevung.
S.PHON: nu maŋʦəz a kasi gaku, vaik a ʦaʎum, vaik a kiʦaʦəvuŋ.
S.TRANSL: When they came back from school, they went to get water or went to meet people (coming back laden from the fields).

S.FORM: kilangdanga aravats tua nia tulu.
S.PHON: kiɭaŋdaŋa aravaʦ tua nia tuɭu.
S.FORM: kilangdanga aravac tua nia tulu.
S.PHON: kiɭaŋdaŋa aravaʦ tua nia tuɭu.
S.TRANSL: They were very obedient to what we told them.

S.FORM: patsun aken tua sikudan.
S.PHON: paʦun akən tua sikudan.
S.FORM: pacun aken tua sikudan.
S.PHON: paʦun akən tua sikudan.
S.TRANSL: I noticed their behaviour.

S.FORM: paquliqulid kaumaya, aya ken.
S.PHON: paquɭiquɭid kaumaja, aja kən.
S.FORM: paquliqulid kaumaya, aya ken.
S.PHON: paquɭiquɭid kaumaja, aja kən.
S.TRANSL: I thought that perhaps what they said was true.

S.FORM: saqetju a ku varung, ka kinemnem anga ken.
S.PHON: saqəcu a ku varuŋ, ka kinəmnəm aŋa kən.
S.FORM: saqetju a ku varung, ka kinemnem anga ken.
S.PHON: saqəʦu a ku varuŋ, ka kinəmnəm aŋa kən.
S.TRANSL: This disturbed me when I thought about it.

S.FORM: izua zua qinaruqarut a sunat a sinipavay tua zua mareka ku kaka.
S.PHON: izua zua qinaruqarut a sunat a sinipavaj tua zua marəka ku kaka.
S.FORM: izua zua qinaruqarut a sunat a sinipavay tua zua mareka ku kaka.
S.PHON: izua zua qinaruqarut a sunat a sinipavaj tua zua marəka ku kaka.
S.TRANSL: My siblings had been given some booklets that were distributed.

S.FORM: ka vaik a sema gaku, ku alapen azua sunat, sa ku supu-i.
S.PHON: ka vaik a səma gaku, ku aɭapən azua sunat, sa ku supu-i.
S.FORM: ka vaik a sema gaku, ku alapen azua sunat, sa ku supu-i.
S.PHON: ka vaik a səma gaku, ku aɭapən azua sunat, sa ku supu-i.
S.TRANSL: When they had gone to school, I took the booklets and read them.

S.FORM: "kiɫivaki tua tja matjaɫaɫak.
S.PHON: "kiʎivaki tua ca macaʎaʎak.
S.FORM: "kiljivaki tua tja matjaljaljak.
S.PHON: "kiʎivaki tua ʦa maʦaʎaʎak.
S.TRANSL: What I read was: “We should love our parents.

S.FORM: nakuya qemtsi tua tsautsau.
S.PHON: nakuja qəmʦi tua ʦauʦau.
S.FORM: nakuya qemci tua caucau.
S.PHON: nakuja qəmʦi tua ʦauʦau.
S.TRANSL: We should not kill people,

S.FORM: nakuya padjumak.
S.PHON: nakuja paɉumak.
S.FORM: nakuya padjumak.
S.PHON: nakuja paɉumak.
S.TRANSL: fornicate,

S.FORM: nakuya tsemakaw.
S.PHON: nakuja ʦəmakaw.
S.FORM: nakuya cemakaw.
S.PHON: nakuja ʦəmakaw.
S.TRANSL: steal.

S.FORM: nakuya qauban.
S.PHON: nakuja qauban.
S.FORM: nakuya qauban.
S.PHON: nakuja qauban.
S.TRANSL: or envy others.

S.FORM: kiɫivaku tua nu ɫaqediqedi," aya zua ku sinupu.
S.PHON: kiʎivaku tua nu ʎaqədiqədi," aja zua ku sinupu.
S.FORM: kiljivaku tua nu ljaqediqedi," aya zua ku sinupu.
S.PHON: kiʎivaku tua nu ʎaqədiqədi," aja zua ku sinupu.
S.TRANSL: Love your neighbours.”

S.FORM: izua zua ku sinupu: "timun parekiɫivaɫivaku," aya zua ku sinupu.
S.PHON: izua zua ku sinupu: "timun parəkiʎivaʎivaku," aja zua ku sinupu.
S.FORM: izua zua ku sinupu: "timun parekiljivaljivaku," aya zua ku sinupu.
S.PHON: izua zua ku sinupu: "timun parəkiʎivaʎivaku," aja zua ku sinupu.
S.TRANSL: Another thing I read was: “Love one another.”

S.FORM: izua zua masanitaɫ uta: "tiaken namatsay aken sa ke kamevaɫut.
S.PHON: izua zua masanitaʎ uta: "tiakən namaʦaj akən sa kə kaməvaʎut.
S.FORM: izua zua masanitalj uta: "tiaken namacay aken sa ke kamevaljut.
S.PHON: izua zua masanitaʎ uta: "tiakən namaʦaj akən sa kə kaməvaʎut.
S.TRANSL: One more thing I read was: “I was dead and came back to life.

S.FORM: tiaken djalan aken, kaqulidan, nasi aken.
S.PHON: tiakən ɉaɭan akən, kaquɭidan, nasi akən.
S.FORM: tiaken djalan aken, kaqulidan, nasi aken.
S.PHON: tiakən ɉaɭan akən, kaquɭidan, nasi akən.
S.TRANSL: I am the way, the truth and the life.

S.FORM: a kisusu tjanuaken nuka matsay tjara ku papevaɫuten," aya zua ku sinupu, sa ke kasalu anga.
S.PHON: a kisusu canuakən nuka maʦaj cara ku papəvaʎutən," aja zua ku sinupu, sa kə kasaɭu aŋa.
S.FORM: a kisusu tjanuaken nuka macay tjara ku papevaljuten," aya zua ku sinupu, sa ke kasalu anga.
S.PHON: a kisusu ʦanuakən nuka maʦaj ʦara ku papəvaʎutən," aja zua ku sinupu, sa kə kasaɭu aŋa.
S.TRANSL: Anyone who follows me, even if they die I will bring them back to life”. That was what I read, and I believed.

S.FORM: ɫakua masiaq aken a semukub, tua ku qinaqivuivuan tua mareka sinzia.
S.PHON: ʎakua masiaq akən a səmukub, tua ku qinaqivuivuan tua marəka sinzia.
S.FORM: ljakua masiaq aken a semukub, tua ku qinaqivuivuan tua mareka sinzia.
S.PHON: ʎakua masiaq akən a səmukub, tua ku qinaqivuivuan tua marəka sinzia.
S.TRANSL: But I was ashamed to attend worship because of what I had said about believers.

S.FORM: ɫakua ka tsuatsuay anga kidjaladjalan anga ken a semukub tua ku tsemekemekeɫ.
S.PHON: ʎakua ka ʦuaʦuaj aŋa kiɉaɭaɉaɭan aŋa kən a səmukub tua ku ʦəməkəməkəʎ.
S.FORM: ljakua ka cuacuay anga kidjaladjalan anga ken a semukub tua ku cemekemekelj.
S.PHON: ʎakua ka ʦuaʦuaj aŋa kiɉaɭaɉaɭan aŋa kən a səmukub tua ku ʦəməkəməkəʎ.
S.TRANSL: But after a time I did accompany my family to worship.

S.FORM: qau kisamuɫanga ken a kiqepu tua sinzia, sa ke keɫang anga tua kakudan nua sinzia.
S.PHON: qau kisamuʎaŋa kən a kiqəpu tua sinzia, sa kə kəʎaŋ aŋa tua kakudan nua sinzia.
S.FORM: qau kisamuljanga ken a kiqepu tua sinzia, sa ke keljang anga tua kakudan nua sinzia.
S.PHON: qau kisamuʎaŋa kən a kiqəpu tua sinzia, sa kə kəʎaŋ aŋa tua kakudan nua sinzia.
S.TRANSL: Then I frequently attended the believers’ meetings, and I understood the believers’ ways.

S.FORM: "iya manu kemudanga," aya ken.
S.PHON: "ija manu kəmudaŋa," aja kən.
S.FORM: "iya manu kemudanga," aya ken.
S.PHON: "ija manu kəmudaŋa," aja kən.
S.TRANSL: “So that’s the way it is,”I said to myself.

S.FORM: samaɫi anga ken.
S.PHON: samaʎi aŋa kən.
S.FORM: samalji anga ken.
S.PHON: samaʎi aŋa kən.
S.TRANSL: I was surprised.

S.FORM: kana liguligu anga ken, sa ke ka kisan sinzia a kirimu, kana ken a matsaqu anga, kana ken a kemɫang anga," ayanga ken a kinemnem.
S.PHON: kana ɭiguɭigu aŋa kən, sa kə ka kisan sinzia a kirimu, kana kən a maʦaqu aŋa, kana kən a kəmʎaŋ aŋa," ajaŋa kən a kinəmnəm.
S.FORM: kana liguligu anga ken, sa ke ka kisan sinzia a kirimu, kana ken a macaqu anga, kana ken a kemljang anga," ayanga ken a kinemnem.
S.PHON: kana ɭiguɭigu aŋa kən, sa kə ka kisan sinzia a kirimu, kana kən a maʦaqu aŋa, kana kən a kəmʎaŋ aŋa," ajaŋa kən a kinəmnəm.
S.TRANSL: “If only I had known and become a believer sooner. Then I would have been good at doing things and would have understood,”I thought.

S.FORM: pateɫip aken aravats tua ika ku kinasinzian a kirimu.
S.PHON: patəʎip akən aravaʦ tua ika ku kinasinzian a kirimu.
S.FORM: pateljip aken aravac tua ika ku kinasinzian a kirimu.
S.PHON: patəʎip akən aravaʦ tua ika ku kinasinzian a kirimu.
S.TRANSL: I greatly regretted that I hadn’t become a believer sooner.

S.FORM: ɫakua ka kisan sinzia aken kisamuɫanga ken aravats a kisusu.
S.PHON: ʎakua ka kisan sinzia akən kisamuʎaŋa kən aravaʦ a kisusu.
S.FORM: ljakua ka kisan sinzia aken kisamuljanga ken aravac a kisusu.
S.PHON: ʎakua ka kisan sinzia akən kisamuʎaŋa kən aravaʦ a kisusu.
S.TRANSL: But when I became a believer I was a very zealous practising believer.

S.FORM: qau pai ka tsuatsuay anga ken tua ku kinasinzian, kinemnem anga ken tua ku vaik a tjemautsikel, sa ke vaik anga sema tjuqaɫa a pasemalamalaw tua kiɫivak tua pitsul nua Tsemas.
S.PHON: qau pai ka ʦuaʦuaj aŋa kən tua ku kinasinzian, kinəmnəm aŋa kən tua ku vaik a cəmauʦikəɭ, sa kə vaik aŋa səma cuqaʎa a pasəmaɭamaɭaw tua kiʎivak tua piʦuɭ nua ʦəmas.
S.FORM: qau pai ka cuacuay anga ken tua ku kinasinzian, kinemnem anga ken tua ku vaik a tjemaucikel, sa ke vaik anga sema tjuqalja a pasemalamalaw tua kiljivak tua picul nua Cemas.
S.PHON: qau pai ka ʦuaʦuaj aŋa kən tua ku kinasinzian, kinəmnəm aŋa kən tua ku vaik a ʦəmauʦikəɭ, sa kə vaik aŋa səma ʦuqaʎa a pasəmaɭamaɭaw tua kiʎivak tua piʦuɭ nua ʦəmas.
S.TRANSL: Some time after I had become a believer I thought of going to tell others, and I went to other villages to tell people about the love and power of God.

S.FORM: ka patagiɫ vaik aken a sema Makazayazaya a pasemalaw tua kai nua Tsemas.
S.PHON: ka patagiʎ vaik akən a səma makazajazaja a pasəmaɭaw tua kai nua ʦəmas.
S.FORM: ka patagilj vaik aken a sema Makazayazaya a pasemalaw tua kai nua Cemas.
S.PHON: ka patagiʎ vaik akən a səma makazajazaja a pasəmaɭaw tua kai nua ʦəmas.
S.TRANSL: First I went to Makazayazaya to tell them about the word of God.

S.FORM: ɫakua inika kemɫang.
S.PHON: ʎakua inika kəmʎaŋ.
S.FORM: ljakua inika kemljang.
S.PHON: ʎakua inika kəmʎaŋ.
S.TRANSL: But they didn’t understand.

S.FORM: ka ku sipakatjelutjeluɫ kemɫang anga tua tulu nua Tsemas.
S.PHON: ka ku sipakacəɭucəɭuʎ kəmʎaŋ aŋa tua tuɭu nua ʦəmas.
S.FORM: ka ku sipakatjelutjelulj kemljang anga tua tulu nua Cemas.
S.PHON: ka ku sipakaʦəɭuʦəɭuʎ kəmʎaŋ aŋa tua tuɭu nua ʦəmas.
S.TRANSL: After my third visit they understood the teaching of God.

S.FORM: qau kisan sinzianga azua tatsekeɫan; saka metjuruvu anga.
S.PHON: qau kisan sinziaŋa azua taʦəkəʎan; saka məcuruvu aŋa.
S.FORM: qau kisan sinzianga azua tacekeljan; saka metjuruvu anga.
S.PHON: qau kisan sinziaŋa azua taʦəkəʎan; saka məʦuruvu aŋa.
S.TRANSL: One family became believers; and later more people did so.

S.FORM: qau nu makapitjuɫ vaik aken a sema Makazayazaya.
S.PHON: qau nu makapicuʎ vaik akən a səma makazajazaja.
S.FORM: qau nu makapitjulj vaik aken a sema Makazayazaya.
S.PHON: qau nu makapiʦuʎ vaik akən a səma makazajazaja.
S.TRANSL: Every week I went to Makazayazaya.

S.FORM: makatjeluɫ aken makasimatjeɫ aken i Makazayazaya a pasemalamalaw tua tulu nua Tsemas.
S.PHON: makacəɭuʎ akən makasimacəʎ akən i makazajazaja a pasəmaɭamaɭaw tua tuɭu nua ʦəmas.
S.FORM: makatjelulj aken makasimatjelj aken i Makazayazaya a pasemalamalaw tua tulu nua Cemas.
S.PHON: makaʦəɭuʎ akən makasimaʦəʎ akən i makazajazaja a pasəmaɭamaɭaw tua tuɭu nua ʦəmas.
S.TRANSL: I stayed in Makazayazaya 3 or 4 days telling them the teaching of God.

S.FORM: tatsaviɫ aken katu izua ɫemules a pasemalamalaw tua tulu nua Tsemas.
S.PHON: taʦaviʎ akən katu izua ʎəmuɭəs a pasəmaɭamaɭaw tua tuɭu nua ʦəmas.
S.FORM: tacavilj aken katu izua ljemules a pasemalamalaw tua tulu nua Cemas.
S.PHON: taʦaviʎ akən katu izua ʎəmuɭəs a pasəmaɭamaɭaw tua tuɭu nua ʦəmas.
S.TRANSL: For over a year I continued telling them the teaching of God.

S.FORM: man alu a puluq aza sinzia.
S.PHON: man aɭu a puɭuq aza sinzia.
S.FORM: man alu a puluq aza sinzia.
S.PHON: man aɭu a puɭuq aza sinzia.
S.TRANSL: There were 80 believers.

S.FORM: ɫakua ku putideqan a tjelu a qiɫas.
S.PHON: ʎakua ku putidəqan a cəɭu a qiʎas.
S.FORM: ljakua ku putideqan a tjelu a qiljas.
S.PHON: ʎakua ku putidəqan a ʦəɭu a qiʎas.
S.TRANSL: But then I didn’t go for 3 months;

S.FORM: kitjaula zua man ḍusa puluq.
S.PHON: kicauɭa zua man ɖusa puɭuq.
S.FORM: kitjaula zua man drusa puluq.
S.PHON: kiʦauɭa zua man ɖusa puɭuq.
S.TRANSL: and 20 of them gave up.

S.FORM: qau mangtjez azua kemasi Karinku a naventsik, vaik anga sema Makazayazaya a zemang tua zua sinzia.
S.PHON: qau maŋcəz azua kəmasi karinku a navənʦik, vaik aŋa səma makazajazaja a zəmaŋ tua zua sinzia.
S.FORM: qau mangtjez azua kemasi Karinku a navencik, vaik anga sema Makazayazaya a zemang tua zua sinzia.
S.PHON: qau maŋʦəz azua kəmasi karinku a navənʦik, vaik aŋa səma makazajazaja a zəmaŋ tua zua sinzia.
S.TRANSL: Then someone came back from studying at Karenko (Hualien), and went to Makazayazaya to look after the believers.

S.FORM: qau vaik anga ken a pasa tjuzuma a tjemautsikel tua kai nua Tsemas.
S.PHON: qau vaik aŋa kən a pasa cuzuma a cəmauʦikəɭ tua kai nua ʦəmas.
S.FORM: qau vaik anga ken a pasa tjuzuma a tjemaucikel tua kai nua Cemas.
S.PHON: qau vaik aŋa kən a pasa ʦuzuma a ʦəmauʦikəɭ tua kai nua ʦəmas.
S.TRANSL: So I went to other places to tell them the word of God.

S.FORM: kasi Masilid anga ken, kasi Djaɫadjaɫay anga ken a tjemautsiketsikel tua kai nua Tsemas.
S.PHON: kasi masiɭid aŋa kən, kasi ɉaʎaɉaʎaj aŋa kən a cəmauʦikəʦikəɭ tua kai nua ʦəmas.
S.FORM: kasi Masilid anga ken, kasi Djaljadjaljay anga ken a tjemaucikecikel tua kai nua Cemas.
S.PHON: kasi masiɭid aŋa kən, kasi ɉaʎaɉaʎaj aŋa kən a ʦəmauʦikəʦikəɭ tua kai nua ʦəmas.
S.TRANSL: I went to Masilid and Djaɫadjaɫay to tell them the word of God.

S.FORM: nuka mayanga qudjaɫ, nuka mayanga vali, tjara vaik aken a sema Makazayazaya.
S.PHON: nuka majaŋa quɉaʎ, nuka majaŋa vaɭi, cara vaik akən a səma makazajazaja.
S.FORM: nuka mayanga qudjalj, nuka mayanga vali, tjara vaik aken a sema Makazayazaya.
S.PHON: nuka majaŋa quɉaʎ, nuka majaŋa vaɭi, ʦara vaik akən a səma makazajazaja.
S.TRANSL: However rainy or windy it was I always went to Makazyazaya.

S.FORM: nuka mayanga tsadjan, nu tjaɫu zuanga tua ku sisazuan, tjara vaik aken.
S.PHON: nuka majaŋa ʦaɉan, nu caʎu zuaŋa tua ku sisazuan, cara vaik akən.
S.FORM: nuka mayanga cadjan, nu tjalju zuanga tua ku sisazuan, tjara vaik aken.
S.PHON: nuka majaŋa ʦaɉan, nu ʦaʎu zuaŋa tua ku sisazuan, ʦara vaik akən.
S.TRANSL: However far it was, when the time came for me to go I always went.

S.FORM: nu zemuker aken i Makazayazaya, puqarut aken a maka puḍipungan a pasemalaw tua taizin: "sinsi, uri pasemalaw aken tua kai nua Tsemas."
S.PHON: nu zəmukər akən i makazajazaja, puqarut akən a maka puɖipuŋan a pasəmaɭaw tua taizin: "sinsi, uri pasəmaɭaw akən tua kai nua ʦəmas."
S.FORM: nu zemuker aken i Makazayazaya, puqarut aken a maka pudripungan a pasemalaw tua taizin: "sinsi, uri pasemalaw aken tua kai nua Cemas."
S.PHON: nu zəmukər akən i makazajazaja, puqarut akən a maka puɖipuŋan a pasəmaɭaw tua taizin: "sinsi, uri pasəmaɭaw akən tua kai nua ʦəmas."
S.TRANSL: When I arrived in Makazayazaya I went straight round to the police station to tell the officer: “Sir, I’m going to preach the word of God.”

S.FORM: "ainu a su vetsik a kemasi Alikang?
S.PHON: "ainu a su vəʦik a kəmasi aɭikaŋ
S.FORM: "ainu a su vecik a kemasi Alikang?
S.PHON: "ainu a su vəʦik a kəmasi aɭikaŋ
S.TRANSL: “Where is your permit from the Alikang police station?

S.FORM: kasi gaku sun?" ayain aken.
S.PHON: kasi gaku sun" ajain akən.
S.FORM: kasi gaku sun?" ayain aken.
S.PHON: kasi gaku sun" ajain akən.
S.TRANSL: Are you a (?Bible school) graduate?” said the officer to me.

S.FORM: nuka ika nemanema siqaqivu tjanuaken.
S.PHON: nuka ika nəmanəma siqaqivu canuakən.
S.FORM: nuka ika nemanema siqaqivu tjanuaken.
S.PHON: nuka ika nəmanəma siqaqivu ʦanuakən.
S.TRANSL: That was said to me without any reason.

S.FORM: ɫakua ika ken a natemvela tua nemanema.
S.PHON: ʎakua ika kən a natəmvəɭa tua nəmanəma.
S.FORM: ljakua ika ken a natemvela tua nemanema.
S.PHON: ʎakua ika kən a natəmvəɭa tua nəmanəma.
S.TRANSL: But I didn’t reply at all.

S.FORM: tuazua masulem anga, qudjaqudjaɫan.
S.PHON: tuazua masuɭəm aŋa, quɉaquɉaʎan.
S.FORM: tuazua masulem anga, qudjaqudjaljan.
S.PHON: tuazua masuɭəm aŋa, quɉaquɉaʎan.
S.TRANSL: It was getting dark, and it was the rainy season.

S.FORM: masepaqudjaɫ aken i djalan.
S.PHON: masəpaquɉaʎ akən i ɉaɭan.
S.FORM: masepaqudjalj aken i djalan.
S.PHON: masəpaquɉaʎ akən i ɉaɭan.
S.TRANSL: I had got rained on on the way.

S.FORM: nuka mayanga ku ɫaɫeqeran, inika ken a sauin a kirimu.
S.PHON: nuka majaŋa ku ʎaʎəqəran, inika kən a sauin a kirimu.
S.FORM: nuka mayanga ku ljaljeqeran, inika ken a sauin a kirimu.
S.PHON: nuka majaŋa ku ʎaʎəqəran, inika kən a sauin a kirimu.
S.TRANSL: Although I was very cold, I wasn’t allowed to go quickly.

S.FORM: nuka ika nemanema, siqaqivu tjanuaken a paqeteleng.
S.PHON: nuka ika nəmanəma, siqaqivu canuakən a paqətəɭəŋ.
S.FORM: nuka ika nemanema, siqaqivu tjanuaken a paqeteleng.
S.PHON: nuka ika nəmanəma, siqaqivu ʦanuakən a paqətəɭəŋ.
S.TRANSL: I was abused without any reason for it.

S.FORM: inika ken a paqiladjen.
S.PHON: inika kən a paqiɭaɉən.
S.FORM: inika ken a paqiladjen.
S.PHON: inika kən a paqiɭaɉən.
S.TRANSL: I wasn’t given a seat.

S.FORM: nu salilim anga sauin anga ken a pasa qinaɫan.
S.PHON: nu saɭiɭim aŋa sauin aŋa kən a pasa qinaʎan.
S.FORM: nu salilim anga sauin anga ken a pasa qinaljan.
S.PHON: nu saɭiɭim aŋa sauin aŋa kən a pasa qinaʎan.
S.TRANSL: It was late at night when I was allowed to go to the village.

S.FORM: mayanga qudjaɫ, mayanga selemanan.
S.PHON: majaŋa quɉaʎ, majaŋa səɭəmanan.
S.FORM: mayanga qudjalj, mayanga selemanan.
S.PHON: majaŋa quɉaʎ, majaŋa səɭəmanan.
S.TRANSL: In spite of the rain and the darkness,

S.FORM: ika ken a pasedjaman tua ɫaung, ika ken a sisan sapui.
S.PHON: ika kən a pasəɉaman tua ʎauŋ, ika kən a sisan sapui.
S.FORM: ika ken a pasedjaman tua ljaung, ika ken a sisan sapui.
S.PHON: ika kən a pasəɉaman tua ʎauŋ, ika kən a sisan sapui.
S.TRANSL: I wasn’t lent anything to keep off the rain and I wasn’t given a torch.

S.FORM: "sa-u," ayain aken.
S.PHON: "sa-u," ajain akən.
S.FORM: "sa-u," ayain aken.
S.PHON: "sa-u," ajain akən.
S.TRANSL: I was just told to go.

S.FORM: ika manu amin.
S.PHON: ika manu amin.
S.FORM: ika manu amin.
S.PHON: ika manu amin.
S.TRANSL: That’s not all.

S.FORM: tua ku sisazuan anga, ika manu kinmusaɫ ika manu kintjeluɫ, maya tuazua tua ku sisazuan anga.
S.PHON: tua ku sisazuan aŋa, ika manu kinmusaʎ ika manu kincəɭuʎ, maja tuazua tua ku sisazuan aŋa.
S.FORM: tua ku sisazuan anga, ika manu kinmusalj ika manu kintjelulj, maya tuazua tua ku sisazuan anga.
S.PHON: tua ku sisazuan aŋa, ika manu kinmusaʎ ika manu kinʦəɭuʎ, maja tuazua tua ku sisazuan aŋa.
S.TRANSL: Whenever I went there, not just twice or three times, it was the same every time.

S.FORM: ika manu amin a i puḍipungan.
S.PHON: ika manu amin a i puɖipuŋan.
S.FORM: ika manu amin a i pudripungan.
S.PHON: ika manu amin a i puɖipuŋan.
S.TRANSL: It wasn’t only at the police station.

S.FORM: nu sema qinaɫan aken, qaqivuin aken a paqeteleng.
S.PHON: nu səma qinaʎan akən, qaqivuin akən a paqətəɭəŋ.
S.FORM: nu sema qinaljan aken, qaqivuin aken a paqeteleng.
S.PHON: nu səma qinaʎan akən, qaqivuin akən a paqətəɭəŋ.
S.TRANSL: When I went to the village I was abused.

S.FORM: pai namaya tutsu a ku siselapay.
S.PHON: pai namaja tuʦu a ku sisəɭapaj.
S.FORM: pai namaya tucu a ku siselapay.
S.PHON: pai namaja tuʦu a ku sisəɭapaj.
S.TRANSL: That was the way I suffered.

S.FORM: nu vaik itjen a tjemautsikel tua kai nua Tsemas, tjara izua tja siselapayan.
S.PHON: nu vaik icən a cəmauʦikəɭ tua kai nua ʦəmas, cara izua ca sisəɭapajan.
S.FORM: nu vaik itjen a tjemaucikel tua kai nua Cemas, tjara izua tja siselapayan.
S.PHON: nu vaik iʦən a ʦəmauʦikəɭ tua kai nua ʦəmas, ʦara izua ʦa sisəɭapajan.
S.TRANSL: When we go to tell the word of God, there are always times when we suffer.

S.FORM: ɫakua paparangez itjen sakamaya tua Tsemas i vavaw.
S.PHON: ʎakua paparaŋəz icən sakamaja tua ʦəmas i vavaw.
S.FORM: ljakua paparangez itjen sakamaya tua Cemas i vavaw.
S.PHON: ʎakua paparaŋəz iʦən sakamaja tua ʦəmas i vavaw.
S.TRANSL: But we just trust God above.

S.FORM: nu kinemnem itjen tua kinipakezkezan ni Yisu-sama tua siselapay, paparangez itjen sakamaya tua tja siselapay.
S.PHON: nu kinəmnəm icən tua kinipakəzkəzan ni jisu-sama tua sisəɭapaj, paparaŋəz icən sakamaja tua ca sisəɭapaj.
S.FORM: nu kinemnem itjen tua kinipakezkezan ni Yisu-sama tua siselapay, paparangez itjen sakamaya tua tja siselapay.
S.PHON: nu kinəmnəm iʦən tua kinipakəzkəzan ni jisu-sama tua sisəɭapaj, paparaŋəz iʦən sakamaja tua ʦa sisəɭapaj.
S.TRANSL: When we think of the suffering of Jesus in his crucifixion, we just trust God in our suffering.
